title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Naukri Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Naukri Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Naukri Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Patna-based team.

About Naukri Digital Technologies:
Naukri Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri Digital Technologies!
